en_title: Hellblade Developer Ninja Theory Has Cancelled Project Mara
cn_title: 《地狱之刃》开发商取消恐怖新作《玛拉计划》
subtitle: 全工作室押注塞娜
opus_summary: Ninja Theory 取消实验性恐怖游戏《玛拉计划》，以便全工作室85人集中开发《地狱之刃》系列新作《塞娜》。该作在2026年Xbox游戏展上公布，将延续系列对精神健康的探索。

paragraphs.en: Ninja Theory has announced that Project Mara , its experimental horror game, has been cancelled.
paragraphs.cn: Ninja Theory 宣布，其实验性恐怖游戏《玛拉计划》(Project Mara) 已被取消。

paragraphs.en: Senua, the third game in Ninja Theory's Hellblade series, was one of the surprise announcements coming out of Xbox Games Showcase 2026 . But with the emergence of Senua comes confirmation that the Microsoft-owned studio's other game is dead.
paragraphs.cn: 《塞娜》(Senua) 是 Ninja Theory《地狱之刃》系列的第三部作品，也是2026年Xbox游戏展上的惊喜发布之一。但随着《塞娜》的亮相，也证实了这家微软旗下工作室的另一款游戏已告终结。

paragraphs.en: In a new Xbox Wire post discussing the announcement of Senua, Ninja Theory studio head Dom Matthews addressed the fate of Project Mara.
paragraphs.cn: 在一篇讨论《塞娜》公布的Xbox Wire新博文中，Ninja Theory 工作室负责人 Dom Matthews 谈到了《玛拉计划》的命运。

paragraphs.en: “With the fact that we have the entire team working on [Senua], I suspect some people might ask what's happened to Project Mara,” said Matthews. “I took the decision to not work on that any further. These decisions are never easy, but I did so to take the opportunity to have all of the talent and expertise in the studio, all 85 creatives, working together to realize the potential of what Senua can be.”
paragraphs.cn: 「由于我们整个团队都在开发《塞娜》，我猜有些人会问《玛拉计划》怎么样了，」Matthews 说道，「我决定不再继续推进那个项目。这些决定从来都不容易，但我这么做是为了让工作室的所有人才和专长——全部85名创意人员——能够齐心协力，共同实现《塞娜》的潜力。」

paragraphs.en: Senua marks the first time that the entire Ninja Theory staff roster has worked on the same project since 2013’s DmC: Devil May Cry. As a result, the developer is creating a more expansive, gameplay-driven take on the Hellblade series, but that required sacrificing its more experimental game.
paragraphs.cn: 《塞娜》标志着 Ninja Theory 自2013年的《DmC：鬼泣》以来，首次全员投入同一个项目。因此，开发商正在打造一款更宏大、更注重玩法的《地狱之刃》系列作品，但这需要牺牲其更具实验性的游戏。

paragraphs.en: Project Mara was announced back in January 2020 , at a time when Ninja Theory was also working on both Hellblade 2 and its ill-fated multiplayer brawler, Bleeding Edge . The project was described as a “real-world and grounded representation of mental terror. Based on real lived experience accounts and in-depth research, the goal is to recreate the horrors of the mind as accurately and realistically as possible. Project: Mara will be an experimental title and a showcase of what could become a new storytelling medium.” It was planned to take place in a deeply detailed, photo-realistic apartment .
paragraphs.cn: 《玛拉计划》早在2020年1月就已公布，当时 Ninja Theory 还在同时开发《地狱之刃2》和命运多舛的多人大乱斗游戏《嗜血边缘》。该项目被描述为「对精神恐惧的现实而接地气的呈现。基于真实的生活经历和深入研究，目标是尽可能准确逼真地再现内心的恐怖。《玛拉计划》将是一款实验性作品，展示一种可能成为新叙事媒介的形式。」游戏原计划发生在一间细节丰富、照片级逼真的公寓中。

paragraphs.en: While Project Mara will no longer see the light of day, Senua will see Ninja Theory continue its exploration of mental health and the horrors of the mind. Psychosis was a fundamental part of the Hellblade games, and the new trailer still features the whispering voices in Senua’s head. Matthews also confirmed that Senua will feature familiar “themes."
paragraphs.cn: 尽管《玛拉计划》将再无面世之日，但《塞娜》将让 Ninja Theory 继续探索心理健康与内心恐惧。精神病症是《地狱之刃》系列的核心元素，新预告片中依然出现了塞娜脑海中的低语声。Matthews 还确认，《塞娜》将包含熟悉的「主题」。

paragraphs.en: Ninja Theory’s cancelling of Project Mara confirms previous rumours , which had also claimed a new Hellblade was in development – all of which has now been proven true. For all of Microsoft's announcements, be sure to catch up with everything announced at Xbox Showcase 2026 , including our best look yet at Fable and more.
paragraphs.cn: Ninja Theory 取消《玛拉计划》证实了此前的传闻，这些传闻还称一款新的《地狱之刃》正在开发中——如今这一切都已成真。至于微软的所有发布内容，请务必了解2026年Xbox游戏展上公布的一切，包括我们迄今对《神鬼寓言》的最佳预览等。

paragraphs.en: Matt Purslow is IGN's Executive Editor of Features.
paragraphs.cn: Matt Purslow 是 IGN 的特稿执行编辑。
